spec_match.rationale: Exercises a real surface of the spec's headline behaviour — caret-shape: auto | bar | block | underscore for editable elements…

interactive.rationale: Five picker buttons drive live CSSOM updates and focus the editable preview.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept page lede restates the feature-index blurb's key promise (overlap on caret, shape).

edge_cases.rationale: The invalid curly keyword path is visible and reports CSS.supports returning false while the computed value stays on the last valid shape.

references.rationale: Page includes the chromestatus.com/feature/6106160780017664 link in the see-also section.

design_system.rationale: All colours come from the shared CSS variables and the layout follows the stage + controls editorial pattern.

summary: Verified with chrome-devtools-mcp 1.1.1 on Chrome Canary: clicked auto, bar, block, underscore, and invalid curly. Computed caret-shape returned auto/bar/block/underscore; curly was rejected with CSS.supports false and no console or network failures.
